body:
### Features
- **claude-agent-sdk:** Add support for `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` [#9202](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9202)
- **graphql:** Support collapse, depth, variables, and error extensions via env [#9111](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9111)
- **LLM Observability:** Support vercel ai sdk v7 [#8949](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8949)
- **mongodb:** Open a parent span for Collection#bulkWrite [#9109](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9109)
- **Test Optimization:** Tag failure screenshot upload result [#9232](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9232)
- **Test Optimization:** Upload failure screenshots to the v2 media endpoint [#8981](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8981)

### Fixes
- **AppSec:** Support apollo v5 blocking [#9007](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9007)
- **aws-durable-execution-sdk-js:** [SVLS-8588] set span type to serverless [#9162](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9162)
- **child_process:** Stabilize promisified exec spans [#9180](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9180)
- **Crash Tracking:** Resolve frames out-of-process on Linux [#9237](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9237)
- **fastify:** Bound avvio's boot re-drive and stop swallowing async hook rejections [#9118](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9118)
- **graphql:** Make the resolve span the active scope inside resolvers [#8208](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8208)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Apply global/resource tags to OTel-bridged spans [#9229](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9229)
- **Profiling:** Abort profile upload on socket timeout [#9217](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9217)
- **Test Optimization:** Changed DD_MAJOR guards to greater than or equal [#9199](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9199)
- **Test Optimization:** Ignore intermediate retry failures in aggregate status [#9231](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9231)
- **Test Optimization:** Instrument build index module loads [#9211](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9211)
- **Test Optimization:** Propagate no-worker request error tags [#9189](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9189)
- **Test Optimization:** Report tests from custom environments [#9194](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9194)
- **Test Optimization:** Stabilize failed test replay waits [#9193](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9193)
- **Test Optimization:** Support concurrent Vitest tests [#8412](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8412)
- **Test Optimization:** Support test.concurrent [#9209](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9209)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **AI Guard:** Rework aiguard integrations [#9185](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9185)
- **AppSec:** Remove dead code and fix stale comments in nosql mongodb analyzer [#9168](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9168)
- **coverage:** Collect integration coverage with native V8 instead of istanbul [#9091](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9091)
- **Dependencies:** Bump import-in-the-middle to 3.3.1 [#9235](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9235)
- **Dependencies:** Bump npm [#9205](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9205)
- **General:** Reject non-string version ranges in withVersions [#9187](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9187)
- **plugin-env:** Read apm-integrations.yml after workflow rename [#9224](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9224)
- **Test Optimization:** Stabilize Playwright retry tagging flake [#9216](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9216)


[SVLS-8588]: https://datadoghq.atlassian.net/browse/SVLS-8588?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
